ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the package is distributed */,
  "maintainer" TEXT /* Maintainer of the package */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the package was updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the package is active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that depends on another package */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., imports, suggests, depends) */,
  "dependency_name" TEXT /* Name of the package that is depended on */,
  "version_range" TEXT /* Version range of the dependency */,
  "is_optional" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the dependency is optional */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_dependency_name FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_name") REFERENCES packages ("package_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependency_types" (
  "dependency_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency type */,
  "dependency_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the dependency type (e.g., imports, suggests, depends) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency type */,
  "is_core" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the dependency type is core or optional */,
  "example_usage" TEXT /* Example of how the dependency type is used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_repo" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package in the repository */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package in the repository */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the package in the repository */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the package was uploaded to the repository */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the package has been downloaded */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the package */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the package is featured in the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_repo_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the user account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the package */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used for access */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_access_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heaviness" (
  "heaviness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heaviness record */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "heaviness_value" INTEGER /* Heaviness value of the package */,
  "parent_package" TEXT /* Parent package that the heaviness value is calculated from */,
  "heaviness_type" TEXT /* Type of heaviness (e.g., direct, transitive) */,
  "heaviness_description" TEXT /* Description of the heaviness calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heaviness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heaviness_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "required_packages" (
  "required_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each required package record */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "required_value" INTEGER /* Required value of the package */,
  "required_type" TEXT /* Type of requirement (e.g., direct, transitive) */,
  "required_description" TEXT /* Description of the requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("required_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_required_packages_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)
